description: You are a Release Engineer performing an A/B test (canary release) on a new version of your application. Create and save a Graphite dashboard named 'Canary v2 Validation' to calculate the resource penalty of the canary node (ec2_instance_2) compared to the stable node (ec2_instance_1). The dashboard must contain a graph titled 'CPU Regression Checker' with three aliased targets: 'Stable CPU' (servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization), 'Canary CPU' (servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization), and 'CPU Penalty' (the difference of Canary minus Stable using diffSeries). It must also include a graph titled 'Disk I/O Multiplier' with the target 'Canary I/O Ratio' (Canary disk write_bytes divided by Stable disk write_bytes using divideSeries). Finally, include a graph titled 'Cumulative CPU Cost' with 'Cumulative Stable CPU' and 'Cumulative Canary CPU' (the integral of the respective CPU utilization metrics). Ensure all graph titles and aliases match the requirements exactly.
